title: Coir Outdoor Door Mat | 60 X 40cm Coconut Coir Welcome Mat | Entrance Doormat with Non-Slip Rubber Backing for Trapping Dirt, Mud, & Moisture (Home Sweet Home, Pack of 1)
features: REMOVES DIRT & DEBRIS: Flatro coir door mat is designed with thick coconut fibres that effectively scrape dirt, mud, and moisture off shoes before they enter your home; Flatro doormat the perfect solution for keeping your indoor spaces clean, especially on rainy days

NATURAL COIR MATERIAL: Made from natural coir (coconut fibres), this outdoor mat offers both strength and stability; Coir is naturally tough and excellent at trapping dirt, while the non-slip rubber keeps it in place

SIZED JUST RIGHT: Measuring 40 x 60 cm, this entrance door mat provides full coverage for your entry while fitting neatly under main doors; Embossed design on this outdoor mats for front door add a unique, stylish touch to your outdoor space, making it a welcoming feature for any home

WON’T SLIP OR SLIDE: Thanks to its quality anti-slip rubber backing, our coir doormat won’t slip; You can count on it to stay put, even when it's windy or wet, keeping your entryway neat without needing constant adjustments
SUPER EASY TO CLEAN & MAINTAIN: Simply shake out the debris or rinse this outside door mat with a hose to remove dirt; It dries fast without needing excessive scrubbing or worrying about buildup
description: Product Description Previous page Natural Coir Rough coconut fibres perfectly scrape dirt & mud off shoes Won’t Slip Its rubber backing won’t let it slip or slide Embossed Design Designed to add a unique & stylish touch to your outdoor space Next page Keeps Your Entryway Cleaner 1 Natural Coir 2 Won’t Slip 3 Embossed Design Reduces Indoor Cleaning by Trapping Dirt Outside Find the Perfect Solution for Home Entrance Scrapper Door Mat Rubber Door Mat Welcome Home Door Mat Material Fine coconut fibres & non-slip rubber backing Material Hollow rubber mat to scrap dust and non-slip backing Material rough coconut fibres & non-slip rubber backing Pattern Mosaic pattern to catch mud, dust from shoes Pattern Hollow pattern to catch mud, dust from shoes Pattern Home Sweet Home pattern for welcome to enter home Is this doormat suitable for outdoor use? Yes, this coir and rubber mat is specifically designed for outdoor entryways. It’s tough enough to handle rain, mud, and daily foot traffic. Will the mat stay in place on wet or smooth surfaces? Absolutely. The rubber backing provides strong grip and prevents slipping, even in wet or windy conditions. How will you clean & maintain the mat? Cleaning is simple, shake off the dirt or hose it down for a deeper clean. What is the material of this doormat? The mat is made from natural coir (coconut fibres) and quality rubber backing. Will this mat fit under standard doors? Yes, the mat measures 40 x 60 cm and is low-profile enough to fit neatly under most main doors without obstructing them.
